description_long: This helicopter features a blocky, angular design with a prominent main rotor consisting of four long, rectangular blades. The fuselage is primarily gray with some darker accents, and it sits atop two sturdy landing skids. The cockpit is located at the front, with large, clear windows framed in black, providing visibility for the pilot and co-pilot. The tail section extends back and includes a tail rotor with a distinctive, squared-off appearance. The overall construction suggests a utilitarian, possibly military or industrial style, with visible steps and access points on the sides. The helicopter is displayed on a flat, gray platform, emphasizing its urban deployment.
description: A blocky, gray helicopter with four main rotor blades, a squared tail rotor, and large cockpit windows, sitting on robust landing skids. The design is utilitarian and angular, with visible access steps and a sturdy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide cockpit windows, the symmetrical main rotor blades, and the squared nose of the helicopter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the access steps, the main and tail rotors, and the full landing skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail boom, the tail rotor, and the symmetry of the landing skids.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cockpit windows, main and tail rotors, and the side structure.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, rectangular main rotor blades, gray in color, with a blocky, pixelated appearance and no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Present, with two rectangular blades oriented vertically at the end of the tail boom, gray in color, with a squared, blocky design and no visible protective structure.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, rectangular landing skids made of gray material, connected by crossbars, with a robust, blocky structure and no visible footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Two large, rectangular cockpit windows at the front, clear with a light blue tint, framed in black, providing wide visibility.
